calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-22-2009 Assigned To Trial Court
MINI MINUTES: Appearances Paul Perdue for Alan Burradell, who is present
Jeffrey Macnamara is present in pro per.

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-22-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: for the Plaintiff Mr. Burdell, who is present
Defendant Mr. Macnamera is present in pro per.

This matter having been assigned from Department 206 to place a settlement agreement on the reocord.
Settlement Conference Held. Case settled. Parties enter into a settlement agreement for premises located at 54 Collingwood street, #1, San Francisco, CA 94102. The terms of the settlement agreement are placed on the record. A settlement agreement is not filed with the court at this time. The parties are affirmed and voir dired by the Court. The court orders both parties to comply with the terms of the agreement.

Judge Katherine Feinstein, Clerk Melinka Jones, Ann Mendoza, CSR 6812

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2009 Off Calendar

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES- ATTY. PAUL R. PERDUE, TEL. NO. 291-0474 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT JEFFERY MACNAMARA'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS DENIED. IF THE AMOUNTS SOUGHT ARE INCORRECT, THAT WILL BE A MATTER OF PROOF. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay, Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR # 5220 =301/REQ/BD
